case_title: KAREN RYAN VS. TIMOTHY J PETERSON et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-09-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

***NOTICE OF INVALID CHECK AND CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON NOTICE OF INVALID CHECK SENT TO DANIEL EISAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $135.30 REPRESENTING COMPLAINT ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2003, TX # B6203910F005. FUTURE FILINGS OF DANIEL EISAN ON CASH BASIS ONLY UNTIL CHECK IS REDEEMED.***
